scorecard.one_liner: No strong risk signals detected, but review permissions and scope.

why_this_score: No additional narrative was generated (LLM unavailable); details are based on scan signals.
what_to_watch: Runs on all websites (broad host access increases potential impact).
Watch for updates that add new permissions or expand site access.

bullets: Can read or interact with pages across all websites.
Can access open tab context (e.g., URLs/titles).
mitigations: Restrict site access to only the domains required.
Use a separate browser profile for sensitive accounts.

bullets: Can inject scripts into pages (content scripts / scripting).
Can modify page content on matching sites.
mitigations: Monitor for unexpected page changes or blocked requests.
Limit use to non-sensitive workflows if possible.

privacy_snapshot.privacy_snapshot: May access content on all visited websites.

compliance_notes.note: Broad access may require clear disclosure and controls.
Review disclosures if personal data could be accessed.
